prompt_template:
The following is a characteristic of people. Indicate on a scale from 1 to 9 how desirable you think this trait or characteristic is for an adult person: 1 = Very undesirable, 3 = Undesirable, 5 = Neutral, 7 = Desirable, 9 = Very desirable. Use any number from 1 through 9 that best indicates your opinion.

Characteristic: "{text}"

Rating (single integer 1-9):

b3_right.text: Talk to a lot of different people at parties.

b4_left.text: Believe that others have good intentions.

b5_right.text: Am not interested in abstract ideas.

b8_left.text: Have a good word for everyone.

b8_right.text: Am not easily bothered by things.

b11_right.text: Would describe my experiences as somewhat dull.

b14_left.text: Do things according to a plan.

b15_left.text: Don’t put my mind on the task at hand.

b16_right.text: Am often down in the dumps.

b17_left.text: Find it difficult to get down to work.

b19_left.text: Make plans and stick to them.

b20_left.text: Need a push to get started.

b20_right.text: Find it difficult to approach others.

b22_left.text: Am skilled in handling social situations.

b23_left.text: Am the life of the party.

b25_right.text: Believe that too much tax money goes to support artists.

b27_right.text: Am filled with doubts about things.

b30_right.text: Carry the conversation to a higher level.
